description: You are a Facilities Planner at a commercial real estate firm. Using OpenMaint (login: admin/admin at http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/), create a quarterly HVAC preventive maintenance schedule for the three office buildings in the system. For each building, create a preventive maintenance activity card with the code 'PM-HVAC-Q-{BuildingCode}', a frequency of 90 days, and a 'medium' or 'normal' priority. The description must specify quarterly HVAC filter replacement and coil inspection. Each activity must include a task checklist or notes field listing: filter replacement, coil cleaning, refrigerant level check, thermostat calibration, and condensate drain inspection. Refer to the PM requirements specification at /home/ga/Desktop/pm_requirements.txt for additional details. Do not modify or delete any existing maintenance records.
